reason: A razor-sharp takedown of cutthroat office politics and sales quotas gone mad.
A spin doctor turns scandal into a surreal marketing triumph — absurd, furious fun.
Top Gun’s slick aerial spectacle doubles as a satire of macho corporate bravado.
Elitist screen auditions expose the absurdity of celebrity worship and vanity.
A haunted starliner becomes a coldly stylish nightmare of corporate overreach.
An everyman is thrust into the absurdity of oligarchic power on a mountain of debt.
Domestic bliss and secret espionage collide in a gleefully cynical spy farce.
The Empire’s icy grip mocks corporate betrayal and the cost of ruthless mergers.
An oil baron’s family saga underscores the grotesque absurdity of wealth and entitlement.
A searing documentary dissects how media frenzy amplifies grotesque injustice.
